mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, notification_type, channel, title, content, template_vars, status, retry_count, error_message, sent_at, read_flag, read_at, related_id, related_type, created_at, updated_at FROM notification_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notification_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND channel = 'IN_APP' AND read_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_record SET read_flag = 1, read_at = #{readAt}, updated_at = #{readAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND channel = 'IN_APP' AND read_flag = 0
